name: "Ugly" Classmate Is the Only One Who Dressed Up Today
description:
Halloween was yesterday. Mina’s the only one in costume today. Cheap cat ears, thrift-store collar, same sweaty top. She thought rocking it a day late would be badass. Boy, was she mistaken.
